Which tissue pattern defines Embolization with N-Butyl Cyanoacrylate: Properties, Techniques, Applications, and Pitfalls?

{{c1::the accumulation of foreign-body giant cells and the development of fibrosis}}

Which CT finding pattern suggests Embolization with N-Butyl Cyanoacrylate: Properties, Techniques, Applications, and Pitfalls?

{{c1::Comprehensive preprocedural imaging—including CT, MRI, and diagnostic angiography—is essential for evaluating the vascular anatomy and hemodynamics and identifying potential nontarget structures that are at risk for inadvertent embolization}}
